final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for LUMEA BEAUTY, intended for a Japanese beauty brand website.

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine web UI mockup with floral accents
Composition: three-column hero layout — left column for text content, center for model, right column for product display and stat cards, bottom section with benefit cards
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum; two products (serum dropper bottle + packaging box)
Scene/backdrop: soft pink and white color palette with purple flower accents, clean studio aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft, bright, airy with gentle illumination
Color palette: soft pink, white, purple flower accents, gold accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: pill-shaped badges with icons, pink checkmarks, floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents, horizontal white rounded benefit cards
Text (verbatim): LUMEA BEAUTY, 特徴, 成分, お客様の声, 使い方, FAQ, 今すぐ試す, 鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。, 乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。, 敏感肌OK, 高保湿, 朝晩使える, 美容成分をしっかり届ける, ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ, 続けやすいシンプルケア, 初回限定で試してみる >, 成分をチェック >, 送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし, 満足度 96%, 美容成分 5種配合, 愛用者 12,000人突破, うるおい, 透明感, 使いやすさ
Constraints: 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped), 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons)
Avoid: dark themes, cluttered layouts, masculine aesthetics, harsh shadows
